title: Scorched Guns: Oregunized
description: Addon bridging Scorched Guns 2 and Oreganized mods
body:
# About

**Required dependencies: [Scorched Guns 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/scorched-guns-2), [Oreganized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized) and [Yung's API](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api)**

This addon features 2 new progerssion tiers made out of **Electrum** and a new material **"Mauvite"**



# Content 

**Lead Rounds** and **Lead Slugs** - New ammo type that deals 50% extra damage to targets with the "Brain Damage" effect
**Incendiary Rounds** - Set on fire and deal 75% extra damage to targets with the "Brain Damage" effect

**Mauvite Sledgehammer** - Acts both as a pickaxe and a weapon. Landing critical hits applies "Brain Damage"
**Throwing Clubs** - Heavy Mauvite clubs. Hitting an enemy will give them "Brain Damage" effect
**Lead Bomb** - Portable Shrapnel Bomb. Explodes into lead shrapnel, giving nearby mobs "Brain Damage" effect
**Mauvite Bludgeon** - Can be dropped from Tirones. Heavy mace for trench warfare, has an increased attack knockback


**Electrum tier:**
- Whirlwind - Your trustry lightweight sidearm, Has 3.0x Critical Damage multiplier
- Hermes - Pocket handcannon chambered in Ramrod rounds, perfect weapon against undead
- Avantrima - SMG that fires in bursts of 4 rounds. Has 3.0x Critical Damage multiplier
- Jackrabbit - Aquatic assault rifle for underwater exploration
- Canter - Gibbs rifle for usage at close and medium ranges
- Haretrot - Pneumatic bolt-action pistol that fires Lead Bolts, perfect against armored targets
- Volter SP - Pocket shock scattergun 
- Mactricia - Conventional SMG chambered in inconventional Shock Cells
- Amperbreaker - Powerful shock scattergun for heavy targets
- Jupiter-7 - Lightweight Amethyst-refracted laser gun


**Mauvite tier:**
- Wolfhound - Reliable sidearm with a helical magazine design
- Warthog - Stylish lever-action carbine for medium ranges
- Tirone SMG - SMG designed for close-quarter combat
- Tirone Conversion - Uncontrollable mess
- Prospector - Heavy duty battle rifle for medium ranges
- Chimera - Powerful LMG for medium and long ranges
- Apotheosis - Perfect when you need a long-range rifle with high RoF
- Sabretusk - Shotgun barrel on a long spear, what can be better?
- Nemesis - Powerful incendiary shotgun
- Megatherium - Heavy incendiary machine gun, exosuit recomended
- Duster - Cheap pneumatic SMG, fires simple Lead Nuggets
- Trenchbroom - Pneumatic Flechette shotgun with a built-in bayonet
